name: Spinach-Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups spinach leaves; washed, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onion and mushrooms in a large pot with the white wine. Cook slowly over low heat for about 10 minutes.
2. Add the water or vegetable broth, enoki mushrooms, and soy sauce. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the spinach and season with pepper. Turn off the heat. Serve as soon as the spinach is wilted.
